settings.name: delay
settings.label: Delay in ms
settings.help: [Delay]||Delay after pageload before first beacon fires

settings.name: session_minutes
settings.label: Session minutes
settings.help: [Session]||Sliding expiry for beacon cookie, refreshed on each pageview||0 = browser session (ends when browser closes)

settings.name: collect_engagement
settings.label: Collect engagement
settings.help: [Engagement]||When yes, send scroll and time-on-page heartbeats
